name: Chicken Vegetable Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine soup, mayonnaise, water chestnuts, lemon juice, mustard, and curry powder in a bowl to make the sauce. Stir well.
2. In a 1-1/2 quart casserole dish, layer half of the vegetables, chicken, sauce, and cheese.
3. Repeat with another layer of vegetables, chicken, sauce, and cheese.
4. Top with bread crumbs.
5. If desired, freeze the casserole. To serve, preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C), thaw if frozen, and bake for about 1 hour or until heated through.
